# Awesome TypeScript Tools

A curated list of useful TypeScript libraries and tools.

## Build Tools

- [esbuild](https://esbuild.github.io/) -- Extremely fast JavaScript bundler
- [tsup](https://tsup.egoist.dev/) -- Zero-config TypeScript bundler powered by esbuild
- [unbuild](https://github.com/unjs/unbuild) -- Unified JavaScript build system

## Testing

- [Vitest](https://vitest.dev/) -- Blazing fast unit test framework
- [Playwright](https://playwright.dev/) -- End-to-end testing for web apps
- [MSW](https://mswjs.io/) -- API mocking for browser and Node.js

## Frameworks

- [Effect](https://effect.website/) -- Typed functional programming for TypeScript
- [Hono](https://hono.dev/) -- Ultrafast web framework for the edge
- [tRPC](https://trpc.io/) -- End-to-end typesafe APIs

## Developer Experience

- [Biome](https://biomejs.dev/) -- Fast formatter and linter
- [tsx](https://github.com/privatenumber/tsx) -- TypeScript execute, zero config
- [zod](https://zod.dev/) -- TypeScript-first schema validation
